name: Nesting Burrows
window: After you produce 1 or more infantry:
windowEffect: You may place up to 2 of those units on your faction sheet. Those units are captured.

name: Necrogenesis
window: Once per ground combat, after 1 of your opponent's units are destroyed:
windowEffect: You may place 1 of your captured infantry from your faction sheet on that planet.

name: Feeding Frenzy
permanentEffect: Apply +1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls during ground combat on a planet that is in a nebula.

name: Swarm
window: Once per action, during invasion on a planet that contains your units:
windowEffect: You may resolve ground combat on that planet even if it does not contain another player's ground forces.

name: Orbital Defense Grid
permanentEffect: PDS you control count as ships during space combat, but they cannot retreat.

name: Galactic Industrial Complex
windowEffect: Return a promissory note to its owner. You may spend 3 resource or influence to place a PDS in a system you control.

name: Orbital Drops
permanentEffect: When you would use Galactic Industrial Complex faction abiity you may plac ea mech from your reinforcements on a planet you control.

name: Mega Structures
permanentEffect: When scoring objectives you may treat each structure you control as if it is on its own separate planet for the purposes of scoring objectives.
